comments.title: 🔥周期比较继续失真，MVRV仍压在低位
comments.body: 市场仍在弱势磨底。核心信号是MVRV仅1.23，明显低于上轮同期的1.69（2022-03），说明本轮链上盈利修复依旧滞后。AHR999只有0.34，价格仍低于200日定投成本约22.0%，筹码端尚未回到健康扩张区。综合判断：中性偏空。这种低盈利、慢修复的状态还要拖多久？
comments.title_en: 🔥 Cycle Comparison Still Distorted, MVRV Remains Pinned Low
comments.body_en: The market is still grinding through a weak bottoming phase. The key signal is MVRV at just 1.23, still well below the 1.69 seen in the same period of the previous cycle (2022-03), showing that on-chain profitability recovery remains lagging this time. AHR999 is only 0.34, while price is still about 22.0% below the 200-day DCA cost, meaning positioning has not yet returned to a healthy expansion zone. Overall verdict: neutral-to-bearish. How much longer can this low-profit, slow-repair regime last?

comments.title: 🔥周期盈利加速出清，MVRV远逊上轮同期
comments.body: 市场正处于深熊级别的价值出清阶段。核心在于MVRV跌至1.22，远低于上轮周期同期的1.69（2022-04）。该指标当前已低于历史80%的时间，且AHR999（0.41）触及2022年中期水平的抄底区，说明本轮周期的链上盈利能力正被加速压缩。价格偏离200日定投成本达-27.5%，长期筹码承受着严酷的账面浮亏。综合判断：偏空。这种周期加速赶底的极限施压还会持续多久？
comments.title_en: 🔥 Accelerated Cycle Profit Flush: MVRV Severely Lagging Previous Cycle
comments.body_en: The market is currently enduring a deep bear-style value flushout. The core signal? MVRV has plunged to 1.22, severely lagging the 1.69 read at this exact stage last cycle (April 2022). This metric is now lower than 80% of its historical timeframe. Add to that the AHR999 index dropping to 0.41—hitting a macro buy-the-dip zone last seen in mid-2022—and it's clear that on-chain profitability this cycle is being aggressively squeezed. Price is currently trading -27.5% below the 200-day DCA cost basis, meaning long-term holders are bleeding with severe unrealized losses. Verdict: Bearish bias. The big question is, how much longer can the market sustain this extreme pressure of an accelerated cycle capitulation?

comments.title: 🔥偏离拟合价54%，估值进入极值区
comments.body: 市场处于极限价值回归阶段。BTC 价格 $68,735，核心在于偏离拟合价格 $149,598 高达 -54.1%，估值压缩程度刷新纪录。同时价格偏离 200日成本 $91,545 达 -24.9%，长期筹码深度套牢。MVRV 仅 1.27，低于历史 77% 的时间，抛压已至枯竭线。当前属于典型的左侧底部特征，变盘仅需流动性确认。此时你敢逆势布局吗？
comments.title_en: 🔥 Off by 54% from Fit Price, Valuation Hits Extreme Zone
comments.body_en: The market is in the stage of extreme value regression. BTC price at $68,735, with the core issue being a deviation from the fit price of $149,598, a massive -54.1%. The compression of valuation has broken records. At the same time, the price is off by -24.9% from the 200-day cost of $91,545, indicating a deep long-term holding of positions. MVRV stands at just 1.27, lower than 77% of historical times, with bearish pressure reaching exhaustion. Currently, it exhibits typical left-side bottom characteristics, and a reversal only requires confirmation of liquidity. Are you brave enough to position against the trend now?

comments.title: 🔥偏离拟合价52%，盈利盘已至枯竭线
comments.body:
市场正处于“亏损换手”的筑底深水区。BTC 在 $70,866 横盘，AHR999 跌至 0.37 抄底区并非偶然，核心在于价格偏离 200日成本 $91,772 达 -22.8%，偏离拟合价格 $149,459 更是高达 -52.6%。这组数据表明，当前价格已严重脱离长期持有者的平均成本，市场正在经历残酷的估值回归。
MVRV 录得 1.31，低于历史 72% 的时间，且远逊于上轮周期同期的 1.69。这意味着全网浮盈极低，获利盘抛压已近枯竭，筹码结构优于 2022 年同期。因此，当前是典型的“以时间换空间”底部构建。
外部环境喜忧参半：摩根士丹利 ETF 即将上市带来长期流动性预期，但 Aave 削减 40% 回购预算折射出 DeFi 收入下滑的寒意。综合判断：短期中性磨底，长期偏多价值凸显。
当价格腰斩于拟合价，你看到的是风险还是带血的筹码？
comments.title_en: 🔥 Off by 52% from Fit Price, Profit Taking at Its End
comments.body_en:
The market is in the deep waters of "loss-taking" bottoming. BTC is hovering at $70,866, and the drop of AHR999 to the 0.37 bottoming zone is not a coincidence. The core lies in the price deviation from the 200-day cost of $91,772 by -22.8%, and an even higher -52.6% deviation from the fit price of $149,459. This set of data indicates that the current price has seriously deviated from the average cost of long-term holders, and the market is experiencing a cruel valuation regression.
MVRV stands at 1.31, lower than 72% of historical times and far worse than the 1.69 during the same period of the previous cycle. This means that the overall floating profit is extremely low, the pressure from profit-taking has nearly run out, and the chip structure is better than that of the same period in 2022. Therefore, the current situation is a typical "time for space" bottom-building.
The external environment is a mixed bag: the upcoming listing of the Morgan Stanley ETF brings long-term liquidity expectations, but Aave's 40% cut in repurchase budget reflects the chill of declining DeFi income. Overall judgment: short-term neutral bottoming, long-term slightly bullish value stands out.
When the price is halved from the fit price, do you see risk or bloodied chips?
